body.p1: The current downloads page lists these binaries in the Linux node package:
body.p2: Legacy names such as hobcd and hobc-cli may appear in old notes. Treat them as legacy unless your installed package actually includes them.
body.p3: If your config file is not in the default location, specify it with -conf=/path/to/hobbyhash.conf.
body.p4: Use getblockchaininfo to check chain height and sync progress. Use getnetworkinfo or getpeerinfo to check peer connectivity. Stop the daemon safely with stop.
body.p5: Review destination addresses and amounts carefully before sending. Use a small test transaction when working with a new wallet or script.
hero.lead: Operator commands for hobbyhashd and hobbyhash-cli with safe RPC usage.
hero.title: CLI / RPC Guide
meta.description: HOBC hobbyhashd and hobbyhash-cli operator commands.
meta.title: CLI / RPC Guide
notice.1: Keep RPC local/private. Never expose RPC to the public internet.
